ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the button style (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button style */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the button style */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the button style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the button style was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the button style */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the button style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_style_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style variation */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button style */,
  "variation_name" TEXT /* Name of the variation (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name for the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button size */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button style */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., normal, large, small, extra small) */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button state */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button style */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., flat, disabled) */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_style_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style version */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button style */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the button style */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_style_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style property */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button style */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., font size, font family, background color) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)
